system.description:
Unleash aggressive combat tactics to disrupt your enemies. Leave the shield behind, it'll only weigh you down.

LEVEL 3

Hold the Line. +STR Armor when wielding a weapon with 2 hands.

Mighty Cleave. Whenever your damage dice sum on a melee attack is 8 or greater, you may select 1 additional target within your weapon's Reach.

LEVEL 7

Shatter Formation. (New Combat Tactic) Action: Roll a Combat Die and deal that much damage to up to STR targets within your weapon's Reach, knocking each one back (Tiny/Small: 3 spaces; Medium: 2 spaces; Large: 1 space). You may use this ability while moving.

LEVEL 11

Relentless Assault. +2 Max Combat Dice. You roll Combat Dice with Advantage.

Tear Asunder. (New Combat Tactic) When you hit (before dealing damage), reduce the target's armor by 1 step for 1 round and deal extra damage equal to a roll of your Combat Die.

LEVEL 15

Even the Odds. If there are 2+ enemies within your weapon's Reach, your melee attacks have advantage and always trigger Mighty Cleave.
